Holiday booking service that just knows what you want
Imagine a world where you dont have to go through all the pain of booking a holiday over and over and over... what if there was a different way?
I would like to book a beach holiday in late August
    DEPARTURE
    21 Aug, MondaySTANSTED
    10:05 STN
    13:35 AHO
    DEPARTURE
    25 Aug, FridayALGHERO
    17:10 AHO
    20:40 STN
    YOUR STAY
    Hotel San Teodoro
    TOTAL£1,453
Range anxiety free journey planner
Own an EV car but range anxiety stressing you out? Agent technology can plan the perfect journey for you so your charging experience is wait free.
I want to drive to Exeter on Oct 5th leaving at 3pm.
OCT 5, WED
15:00 - Departure from Norwich
18:00 - Arrival to Salisbury
Charge your vehicle18:15 - 20:15
Reservation at Harvester18:15 - 20:15
20:30 - Departure from Salisbury
22:30 - Arrival to Exeter

Powerful developer tools to make the most of the possibilities
"The emerging ecosystem combines innovative Web3, AI, and open-source technologies with the tried-and-tested software and hardware capabilities of traditional technology and mechanical engineering companies. This demonstrates that shared knowledge generates added value, and that major advances in information technology give rise to actual industrial applications."
Peter BuschChair Fetch.AI Foundation,Global Product Owner DLT Robert Bosch GmbH
"Thanks to our integration with Fetch, peaq network builders can now optimize business processes using agents within the Economy of Things. Fetch.ai's autonomous agents, already accessible on peaq's testnet - Krest, augment tasks like finding ideal parking spots or charging stations. The seamless integration owes much to the professionalism of the Fetch.ai team."
Till WendlerCo-founder of peaq
"Engaging with Fetch.ai's agent technology has been a rewarding journey. These agents are adept at tasks ranging from supply chain optimization to data trading, showcasing their broad applicability. One of the highlights for me is the user-friendly development process; it's evident that even those new to the technology can grasp and utilize its capabilities."
AutonomousAIDevCommunity Developer
“The collaboration between Ocean Protocol and Fetch represents a significant step towards mutual adoption. It strengthens both growing communities. Working with Fetch has been remarkably smooth, thanks to their highly skilled and professional team.”
Ana LoznianuEngineering Team Lead at Ocean Protocol
"Creating Microagents is like creating a company that works for you. Fetch.ai technology totally changed my vision and view on development and it wasn’t hard to get started as the tech has been adapted to enable everyone to join in."
Crypto_aiCommunity Developer
"In the areas of mobility and IoT, Fetch.ai can be used to leverage enormous potential. At Datarella, we use microagents to reduce complexity, automate processes, reduce costs with our partners, and enable innovative business models."
Michael ReuterFounder & CEO of Datarella
